title: SE: ULTRACRAFT
description: Optimization modpack fully transmitting and complementing the experience of the ULTRACRAFT mod.
body:
# Mankind is **Dead**. **Blood** is fuel. **Hell** is Full.
The modpack does not change the experience of the [ULTRACRAFT mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/absolute-ultracraft), only tries to complement it.

In-game content:
- Modified menus
- New menus such as Soundtrack Menu, Modpack Authors Menu and Additional Thanks.
- A ton of QoL and Utility mods for regular players as well as map creators.
- 7 Levels.
- A Soundtrack.
- Cybergrind.
- Redrawn UltraHUD icons by [kra5iva](https://t.me/kra5ivaErm)
- Node//Block based Scripting System to make functional Levels like in Ultrakill
- Blood
- All Prologue and Limbo Enemies
- 19 Weapons (Revolver Variants + Slab, Shotgun Variants & Machine Sword, Nailgun Variants, Flamethrower, Soap, and an original one)
- Parry and offhand Punch Mechanic
- Ultrakill movement tech (enter High Velocity mode pressing V) (even including things like Wall-Jumps, Alternate Underwater Physics and Slam Storage)
- A bunch of Blocks and Items
- Lots Settings for Server/World configuration
- Structures
- Customizable Wings
- Almost too Customizable Terminals
